description: MCP server for Openpay — BBVA-owned Mexican gateway (cards, SPEI, OXXO, subscriptions, payouts)
name: io.github.codespar/mcp-openpay

environmentVariables.description: Openpay merchant id (forms part of the API URL path)
environmentVariables.name: OPENPAY_MERCHANT_ID

environmentVariables.description: Openpay private API key (used as HTTP Basic auth username with empty password)
environmentVariables.name: OPENPAY_PRIVATE_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Environment: 'sandbox' (default) or 'production'. Selects between https://sandbox-api.openpay.mx and https://api.openpay.mx.
environmentVariables.name: OPENPAY_ENV
